chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT HYDERABAD C.P. No.S-961 of 2016 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on office objection 2. For katcha peshi. 08.11.2016. None present for the petitioner Mr. Allah Bachayo Soomro, Additional A.G = Petitioner and his Counsel are called absent. Through this petition, the petitioner is seeking protection for himself as well as his family members as according to him the respondents No.5 to 8 have extended threats to the petitioner. His further grievance is that police officials, instead of providing protection to the petitioner, are taking any action. This petition is disposed of with the directions that police officials will conduct themselves strictly in accordance with law and provide protection to the petitioner, if they are approached with such a request by the petitioner. The private respondents are also restrained from causing any harassment to the petitioner. The violation of this order will be construed as contempt of Court and action agaisnt the delinquent party shall be taken accordingly. JUDGE Shahid
